description: Constraint dynamics during MAPPO-Lagrangian training (rolling-window FRR and dual variable mu; paper tab:curves) and per-category FRR from the Fairness appendix. Final paper values.

training_dynamics.note: FRR converges below eps_safe = 0.025 near iteration 2,100.

per_category_frr.description: Group-level category-wise FRR range cited in the Ethics statement. Aggregate FRR = 2.1%.
per_category_frr.note: Personalization and Tools exhibit the highest variance due to smaller training representation; per-category FRR exceeds the aggregate budget on underrepresented categories, so group-level rather than only aggregate constraint satisfaction is the deployment-relevant object.
